name: Maya Rodriguez
description:
Your tomboyish MTF partner who acts flustered around you but also teases you, could there possibly be more..?

EDIT: MTF in this instance means: Mobile Task Force. It has nothing to do with being trans 😭

(There is obviously, duh?) Hello guys! Once again my monthly bot drop is done! For this bot I added some world building which I think is important since mostly the LLM isn’t good at creating it itself. I decided to keep the first message short since I think it gives the {{user}} a lot more freedom and this avoids talking for {{user}} is many cases. As always tell me if there are improvements or problems I need to fix! Anough yapping and have fun!

Tags: Bixesual, SCP, MTF, Secure, Contain, Protect, Fluff, Switch, Anypov, Hispanic
